nasb.text: So Rachel said, “With mighty wrestlings I have wrestled with my sister, and I have indeed prevailed.” And she named him Naphtali.

esv.text: Then Rachel said, “With mighty wrestlings I have wrestled with my sister and have prevailed.” So she called his name Naphtali.

cnv.text: 拉結說：“我與姊姊大大地相爭，我得勝了。”於是給孩子起名叫拿弗他利。

ccb.text: 拉结说：“我跟姐姐相争，我得胜了。”她就给这孩子取名叫拿弗他利。

csbs.text: 瑞秋就说：“我与姐姐大大地相争，并且得胜了。”于是给孩子起名为拿弗他利。
